name: M9 刺刀（★） | 伽玛多普勒
nameZh: M9 刺刀（★） | 伽玛多普勒
descriptionEn: This is the M-9 bayonet. Originally intended to be mounted on a rifle, it is also well suited to close-quarters combat. It has been painted with black and silver metallic paints using a marbleizing medium, then candy coated.
descriptionZh: 这是 M-9 刺刀。起初是装在步枪上面的，其同时还非常适合近距离作战。 这件武器使用黑色和银色的金属涂料，仿大理石纹调和，并对其危险性进行了伪装。
